title: K-pop’s NewJeans Hints at Comeback After Monthslong Feud With Its Label
summary_full: The girl group had tried to cut ties with Ador, a subsidiary of the behemoth Hybe, but a court squashed that effort.
summary_public: The girl group had tried to cut ties with Ador, a subsidiary of the behemoth Hybe, but a court squashed that effort.
